summary: Frontend-only Playwright testing for Build Smarts Infra landing page. All 18 requested features verified working. No console errors. Site loads correctly at the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.

issues: Card title text ('Luxury Villa', 'Sunrise Apartments') appears slightly clipped at the top edge of the card overlay in default viewport. Cosmetic only — VIEW PROJECT link and image visible. Consider increasing card padding-top or reducing title font-size.

action_items: Optional: review Portfolio card title positioning so the title isn't visually clipped at the card top edge.

Note for review_request agent_to_agent_context_note: the actual data-testids in code differ from those listed in spec. Correct ones are: 'navbar-mobile-toggle' (not 'mobile-nav-toggle'), 'why-us-card-{i}' (not 'wcu-card-{i}'), 'lightbox-thumb-{i}' (not 'portfolio-lightbox-thumb-{i}'). Existing testids work — no fix needed in code.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero VIDEO_URL points to an external CDN (coverr.co) that may 404 in the future; poster image fallback handles this gracefully but consider self-hosting the .mp4 in /public for reliability.
Contact form intentionally has no backend wiring (matches spec). Toast feedback works correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 18 acceptance items pass. Verified: hero loads with correct heading 'Building Dreams with Precision & Innovation'; counters animate to 1.5M+/50+/5+/100%; all 6 desktop nav links smooth-scroll to correct sections; mobile nav toggle (testid='navbar-mobile-toggle') opens menu and 'mobile-nav-link-about' scrolls; hero CTA buttons scroll to #contact and #portfolio (allow ~2s for smooth scroll across long distances); About/Team(7)/Services(6)/Packages(3 with Gold MOST POPULAR badge)/WhyChooseUs(8 'why-us-card-*')/Process(7 steps)/Footer all render correctly; package-cta-gold scrolls to contact; packages-compare-toggle expands the comparison table; portfolio-card-0 opens lightbox, thumbs use testid 'lightbox-thumb-*' and switch images, close works; testimonials next/prev/3 dots; FAQ accordion opens/collapses previous; contact form shows error toast on empty submit and success toast + clears fields on valid submit (no backend call — sonner toast only); WhatsApp button has correct wa.me/919876543210 href; back-to-top appears after scroll>600px and returns to top; footer shows '© 2026 Build Smarts Infra'. Only minor design observation: portfolio card titles slightly clipped at top edge.
